text.zh: Pandemonium 感知架构 是当前 legacy 展示中的一个 AI 历史节点。
text.en: Pandemonium is an AI history milestone in the current legacy presentation.

text.zh: Pandemonium 把感知描述为简单特征检测器与高层模式识别器之间的分层竞争。它用带噪声的分布式投票隐喻，预示了后来的集成识别、黑板式系统和分层模式处理思想。
text.en: Pandemonium described perception as a layered competition among simple feature detectors and higher-level pattern recognizers. Its noisy, distributed voting metaphor anticipated later ideas in ensemble recognition, blackboard-style systems, and layered pattern processing.
